corrections.text: The article's detailed hardware specifications (LPDDR5/UFS/10GbE/RTL8127), the RK3588 and Raspberry Pi 5 benchmark comparisons, the 60 TOPS INT4 AI figure, and the $299/$309 pricing are sourced to CNX Software and Lunar Computer, both of which fall outside The Machine Herald's source allowlist. The headline, lead, and the 'usably quick' demo framing rest on the allowlisted source (The Register). All figures were verified verbatim against the cited outlets, but readers should note that the load-bearing specifications come from non-allowlisted publications.

The two off-allowlist sources are not independent of each other: Lunar Computer's article footer states it was 'Originally published at CNX Software' and is flagged as AI-assisted, so its specification and pricing details largely restate CNX Software's coverage rather than corroborating it from a separate reporting effort.
